data.title: Ethereum Circulation Surges Post-Merge Upgrade
data.description: Ethereum's circulation has increased by over 950,000 units since the completion of its merge upgrade. According to Odaily, the total circulation of Ethereum is now approximately 121.5 million units, with an annual inflation rate of about 0.23%.

data.title: India Reaffirms Oil Purchase Strategy Focused on National Interests
data.description:
India's Ministry of External Affairs spokesperson, Jaiswal, reiterated the country's oil purchasing strategy, emphasizing that it is guided by national interests. According to RTHK, Jaiswal stated that India's Foreign Secretary, Harsh Vardhan Shringla, had previously clarified India's stance on oil procurement, which remains unchanged. India will explore purchasing oil from Venezuela if commercial conditions permit.

Citing earlier reports from Indian media, Xinhua News Agency noted that on the 9th of this month, Shringla responded to related inquiries by affirming that India's energy policy consistently adheres to principles of adequate supply, reasonable pricing, and stable sources. India is committed to diversifying its energy supply in alignment with national interests.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | European Nations Launch Cost-Effective Air Defense Initiative
data.description: In response to the significant role drones have played in the Russia-Ukraine conflict, several European countries are reevaluating their air defense strategies. According to Ming Pao, the United Kingdom, France, Germany, Italy, and Poland announced on Friday, the 20th, the launch of a collaborative low-cost air defense program. This initiative aims to expedite the development of drone technology.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Russia Warns Against NATO Military Plans for Svalbard
data.description: Russia has issued a warning to Norway and NATO regarding the inclusion of the Svalbard archipelago in their military planning. According to Jin10, the statement was made by Andrey Chemerilo, Russia's Consul General in Svalbard, in a written response to The Wall Street Journal. Some officials in Oslo have suggested that Norway should deploy military forces on Svalbard as a deterrent measure. The archipelago is located in the Arctic Ocean and its international legal status was established by the Svalbard Treaty signed in 1920. The treaty recognizes Norway's sovereignty over the territory while granting signatory countries, including Russia, equal rights to exploit natural resources within Svalbard and its territorial waters.

data.title: AI Security Tool Detects 92% of Real-World DeFi Exploits
data.description:
A February 2026 study by AI security firm Cecuro found that a purpose-built AI security agent successfully detected 92% of real-world DeFi exploits tested in its research. The study analyzed 90 smart contracts that had been exploited between late 2024 and early 2026, representing approximately $228 million in total losses.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ai-security-tool-detects-92-of-real-world-defi-exploits/

data.title: Uniswap Labs Introduces New Features for AI Integration in DeFi
data.description: Uniswap Labs has unveiled seven new features designed to provide structured access to core protocol operations. According to NS3.AI, these updates are intended to assist developers in establishing AI agent workflows directly on-chain. This advancement represents a significant move towards incorporating AI-driven automation within the decentralized finance sector.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 68,000 USDT with a 0.31% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 21, 2026, 08:44 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 68,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 68,009.992188 USDT, with a narrowed 0.31% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: The probability of the US striking Iran before March 31st has risen to 63% on Polymarket.
data.description: Data from Polymarket shows that the probability of a U.S. strike on Iran before March 31 has risen to 63%, with trading volume exceeding $12 million. Previous reports indicated that the U.S. military is preparing for an attack on Iran that could last for weeks should Trump order it.

data.title: Hong Kong Offers Compensation for Wang Fuk Court Fire Victims
data.description: Hong Kong authorities have proposed compensation packages for homeowners affected by the Wang Fuk Court fire last year, with acquisition prices exceeding initial estimates. Bloomberg posted on X, detailing that the plan will require a total expenditure of HK$6.8 billion ($870 million). The proposal aims to provide financial relief to those who lost their homes in the blaze, ensuring they receive fair compensation for their properties. The government’s offer reflects its commitment to addressing the needs of affected residents and facilitating their recovery from the incident.

data.title: Uniswap: Released seven new capabilities to support AI agents performing on-chain operations.
data.description: Uniswap Labs announced on the X platform that it has released seven new features designed to provide structured access to core Uniswap protocol operations. These features will serve as a starting point for developers to build AI agent workflows on-chain.

data.title: Coinbase's Bitcoin premium has remained negative for 37 consecutive days, currently at -0.0523%.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, the Coinbase Bitcoin Premium Index has been in negative territory for 37 consecutive days, currently at -0.0523%, exceeding the previous record of approximately 30 consecutive days of negative premiums during the "10/11 crash." The Coinbase Bitcoin Premium Index measures the difference between the price of Bitcoin on the Coinbase platform and the global market average price; a negative index indicates that Coinbase's price is lower than the global average.

data.title: ECB President Christine Lagarde Considers Early Departure Amid Digital Euro Advancements
data.description: Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank (ECB), is reportedly contemplating an early departure from her role to potentially influence the selection of her successor. According to NS3.AI, this consideration comes as the ECB progresses the digital euro project into its subsequent development phase. These developments underscore notable leadership and regulatory shifts within the ECB, which could have implications for the future of digital currency in Europe.

data.title: Nakamoto completes acquisition of BTC Inc and UTXO for approximately $81.63 million.
data.description: Nakamoto, a Bitcoin treasury company, announced the completion of its acquisition of Bitcoin media and events company BTC Inc. and investment firm UTXO Management, making both companies wholly owned subsidiaries. The transaction was entirely paid for with Nakamoto common stock and options. According to the disclosure, holders of securities in BTC Inc. and UTXO received a total of 364,795,104 Nakamoto common shares on a fully diluted basis, valued at approximately $81.63 million. BTC Inc. is the organizer of The Bitcoin Conference and the parent company of Bitcoin Magazine.

data.title: Since its merger, Ethereum's circulating supply has increased by over 950,000 coins, with an annualized inflation rate of approximately 0.23%.
data.description: According to ultrasound.money data, Ethereum's circulating supply has increased by over 950,000 since the merge and upgrade. The current total circulating supply of Ethereum is approximately 121.5 million, with an annualized inflation rate of approximately 0.23%.

data.title: USDC Circulation Increases by 700 Million in One Week
data.description: Circle's website reveals that in the week ending February 19, USDC issuance reached approximately 5.3 billion, while redemptions totaled around 4.6 billion, resulting in a net increase of about 700 million USDC in circulation. According to Foresight News, as of February 19, the total circulation of USDC stood at approximately 73.7 billion, with reserve assets valued at around 74 billion dollars.
